prompt: Critique the design rationale and provide feedback aligned to the rubric.

criteria.name: Technical Correctness
criteria.description: Soundness of engineering claims, calculations, and assumptions.

performance_descriptors.excellent: All claims accurate with validated calculations.
performance_descriptors.good: Mostly accurate; small errors not affecting conclusions.

criteria.name: Design Justification
criteria.description: Clarity of trade-offs, constraints, and alternatives.

performance_descriptors.excellent: Clear trade-offs and constraints with alternatives considered.

few_shots.final_submission: We selected aluminum 6061 for weight and corrosion resistance; FEA shows a safety factor of 2.1 under peak load.
The project demonstrates strong optimization and synergy. Overall, the approach is efficient and best-in-class.

submissions.final_submission: Thermal analysis indicates the heatsink is undersized. Switching to a finned geometry increases surface area by ~35% at the same footprint.
The design is effective and robust. The solution is ideal and presents many benefits that are clear and persuasive.
I wrote the results and then used assistance to expand the introduction and polish grammar; the CFD setup and results are mine.
